name: SOUJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - TENSHOU RANKA (SPEAR ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - DIVINE STORM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mas Mob Range: Melee attack

Make one attack per 4 levels (maximum 5), each at your highest attack bonus. Each attack deals half your normal weapon damage on hit, but they cannot score critical hits, nor can you apply sneak attack damage to them. For the next three rounds, you deal 1 damage to the target at the start of your turn for each of these attacks that hit.

A Samurai with at least 10 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Soujutsu path, and only once per round. If you substitute the technique this way, the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps each allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.
